summary: The current visual development focuses on generating an image depicting Bunter's rescue attempt and Sharak trapping him in a plasma cage, specifically within the context of Sharak's monologue. The "Nano Banana 2" model was selected for consistency on this initial pass, invoked via the `npx pixverse create image` command. The desired aesthetic is a "premium luminous 3D animated feature-film" with true 3D depth, cinematic camera angles, volumetric light, and a shallow depth of field, aiming for a high-quality 4K look. Character references include Aisha (16-year-old human princess, in shock/fear, `@image1`), Nibzu (silly spider sidekick, amused, `@image2`), Sharak (antagonist king, malevolent/triumphant, `@image3`), and Bunter (white panther, brave/fierce then trapped/desperate, `@image5`). The Throne Room main view (`@image4`) is specified as the location reference, requiring 100% unchanged architecture, lighting, scale, throne, and Zahra fresco.
